site.name: Site Ultime
site.tagline: 2D multiplayer universe — casino, RPG, card games and more.

tcg.loginRequired: Sign in to see your stats.
tcg.myMatches: Your last 100 PvP matches (casual and ranked). Bot battles are not recorded.
tcg.questsSubtitle: 5 challenges to complete daily. Resets at midnight UTC. Progress tracks automatically as you play — just come back to claim the rewards.
tcg.questsLoginRequired: Sign in to see your quests.
tcg.replaysSubtitle: Text logs of your last 50 PvP matches. Click a match to replay it step by step.
tcg.replaysEmpty: No replays yet. Play some PvP matches!

settings.title: ⚙️ Settings
settings.subtitle: Your preferences are saved and synced across devices.
settings.compactModeDesc: Reduce padding and margins (higher info density).
settings.notifEnableDesc: Master switch — disable everything at once.
settings.notifTradesDesc: When a player proposes a trade or responds to yours.
settings.notifTournamentsDesc: Start of a tournament you're registered for.
settings.notifSeasonsDesc: Season closure with ELO snapshot + rewards.
settings.a11yMotion: The site automatically respects your OS's prefers-reduced-motion preference — long animations are disabled if you've enabled "reduce animations".

help.title: ❓ Help
help.subtitle: Answers to frequently asked questions. If you can't find yours, ask on Discord.

changelog.title: 📝 Changelog
changelog.subtitle: Site improvements and new features, in reverse chronological order.
